parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'reservation_reminder_hour')::int AS send_hour,
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM now() AT TIME ZONE (SELECT COALESCE(value,'America/Sao_Paulo') FROM settings WHERE key='timezone'))::int AS current_hour,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'establishment_name')  AS establishment_name,
  (SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'establishment_address') AS establishment_address

SELECT
  r.id,
  r.code,
  r.customer_phone,
  COALESCE(c.name, 'cliente') AS customer_name,
  r.date,
  r.time::text AS time,
  r.party_size,
  t.number AS table_number,
  CASE
    WHEN r.date = CURRENT_DATE + 1 THEN 'amanha'
    WHEN r.date = CURRENT_DATE     THEN 'hoje'
  END AS tipo_lembrete
FROM reservations r
JOIN customers c ON c.phone = r.customer_phone
LEFT JOIN tables t ON t.id = r.table_id
WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL
  AND r.status IN ('pending', 'confirmed')
  AND (
    (r.date = CURRENT_DATE + 1 AND r.reminder_1day_sent = false)
    OR
    (r.date = CURRENT_DATE     AND r.reminder_day_sent  = false)
  )
ORDER BY r.date, r.time

UPDATE reservations SET
  reminder_1day_sent = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.tipo_lembrete }}' = 'amanha' THEN true ELSE reminder_1day_sent END,
  reminder_day_sent  = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.tipo_lembrete }}' = 'hoje'   THEN true ELSE reminder_day_sent  END,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
